site.name: Kandyan Handicraft Center
site.description: Handcrafted jewellery inspired by Sri Lankan heritage.

rings.name: Rings
rings.description: Elegant handcrafted rings for timeless beauty.

pendants.name: Pendants
pendants.description: Ornate gold pendants with heritage filigree detail.
